generated_oml:
instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing crane state data within the physical crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data stored in TimescaleDB for historical logging and real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplication, RealTimeVisualizationEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Application logging crane state data into TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time visualization of crane operational status using MQTT data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation of digital twin model fidelity against physical system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control algorithms to adjust crane movements efficiently"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for software architecture visualization with context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualizationEnabler
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for efficient crane operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustCraneMovementAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for system performance tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalPerformanceInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring operational status"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStatusInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure model fidelity against physical system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelFidelityInsight
]

instance AdjustCraneMovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of crane movements for optimal operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CraneStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane operational status for monitoring"
]

instance HistoricalPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for tracking system performance"
]

instance ModelFidelityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation of digital twin model fidelity against physical system behavior"
]

instance LabGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Research laboratory environment for lab-scale gantry crane system"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneComponent, PhysicalCraneInterface, CraneStateSensor
]

instance PhysicalCraneComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure and controller of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program capturing crane state data and transmitting via MQTT"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are processed by the Control Application, which interfaces with the Physical Crane via the Physical Crane Interface (Python program). The Continuous Validation Service provides feedback by comparing executed trajectory measurements against simulated trajectories to ensure accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system utilizes an MQTT Broker for inter-service communication, with all digital twin components (including Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, and Logging Application) connected via MQTT pub/sub messaging. TimescaleDB serves as the central database for data storage, and Grafana is used for dashboard visualization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar utilizes AutomationML as an industry-standard modeling language for digital twin implementation and Microsoft Azure tools for the digital twin pipeline. No additional standards compliance or interoperability specifications beyond AutomationML are mentioned in the documents."
]
